items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah hails passage of Jan Vishwas Bill, 2026
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah hails passage of Jan Vishwas Bill, 2026 Jan Vishwas Bill will accelerate Ease of Living and Ease of Business Cutting down on several legal provisions, it makes Modi Ji's vision of New India a grand reality It will make life easier and business simpler for all Posted On: 03 APR 2026 10:…

items.title: Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj on his Punyatithi
items.snippet: Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau Ministry of Home Affairs Union Home Minister and Minister of Cooperation Shri Amit Shah pays tribute to Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj on his Punyatithi Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj remains an immortal symbol of Indian pride and an eternal guardian of national glory Realizing the importance of control over the seas, the powerful navy he built reflects his unparalleled strateg…
